Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens, Supporting Declaration Of Howard Epstein, Supporting Memorandum And Order
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Defendant Rose Okello present opposing party. (no telephone provided).
Atty. Ross Mclauran Madden Attorney at Law (415-567-1212) appearing for intervenor 168 Jersey Street LLC moving party.

Argued- The court adopted its tentative ruling as follow: INTERVENOR 168 JERSEY STREET, LLC'S Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens is GRATED. Plaintiff failed to show by preponderance of evidence probable validity of her claims. Intervenor's request for costs and sanctions is grated: $510 in costs and $750 in attorney's fees. Order signed in open court. Judge Kay Tsenin, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (KS/501)

Off Calendar Sep-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Leslie F. Vandale of Schiffer & Buus APC (949-825-6140) via CourtCall appearing for defendant Impac Fnding corporation moving party. No other appearance.

Tentative ruling is adopted, DEFENDANT IMPAC FUNDING CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained without leave to amend, plaintiff failed to make proposed amendments of the original complaint in this amended complaint: The opposition to this motion is the same boiler plate as opposition to the demurrer to the original complaint. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)

Off Calendar Jun-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Leslie Vandale, via CourtCall, (949-825-6140) of Schiffer & Buus APC for Impac Funding Corporation, defendant and moving party; No other appearance

The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANT IMPAC FUNDING CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained, with leave to amend as fraud in inducement, cancellation of instrument breach of covenant of good faith and fair dealing and as to promissory estoppel to allege only as to other defendants. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Not reported (D501)
